description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a mix of brick and large glass windows, set on a landscaped lot with trees and a fenced yard. The structure is composed of two main volumes, one with two stories and the other single-story, connected by a central section with extensive glazing. The front includes a driveway with a car, a garage, and a prominent entryway flanked by greenery. The backyard is spacious, featuring a lawn, a wooden deck, and a circular pool or garden feature. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and grouped. The flat roofs and clean lines give the house a contemporary, minimalist appearance.
description: A modern, two-volume house with brick and glass facades, flat roofs, and landscaped front and back yards, including a driveway, garage, and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and large windows with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-story section, vertical window arrangement, and circular backyard feature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, large backyard, and extensive glass doors opening to the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, fenced yard, and additional entry points with more greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped smaller windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, large glass door, flanked by windows and landscaping, adjacent to a driveway and garage
